title: Printing a Simple Shipping Label

posts.author: TomH (Tom Hutchinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’ve searched everywhere for this answer with no success! Is there a simple way to print a simple shipping label using the data on a pulse?
We are constantly copying and pasting in to a word document to dispatch items which seems a bit backwards.
Any ideas/suggestions would be much appreciated.

Thanks

posts.author: ChrisRad (Chris Rad)
posts.cookedHtml:
We ended up using a third party integration with eledo and created a button column to auto populate the shipping information into the packing slip.

Keep in mind this will require some ‘light’ programming to get it all set up.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
